hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines AML case escalation by integrating alerts, screening results, and workflows into a unified compliance layer that supports consistent decisions and audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case escalation depends on manual interpretation
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to apply consistent escalation rules when alert triage and case review rely on fragmented inputs and disconnected review paths. This increases manual workload and weakens audit readiness across AML case workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects alert triage, provider outputs, case reviews and decision logs into one escalatable workflow to help VASP compliance teams apply consistent AML rules with full audit traceability.
workflow_title: From alerts to escalated compliance cases
workflow_description: SFTY routes AML alerts through predefined escalation rules into structured cases supporting review, decision logging, evidence preservation and regulatory reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. One escalation layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that unifies alert triage, case escalation rules, decisions and evidence for consistent, auditable AML compliance workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled case escalation workflows that preserve audit-ready evidence and prepare compliance teams for bank due diligence and enterprise deployment needs.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support AML case escalation workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case escalation rules apply to alerts
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports AML case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for provider-neutral escalation control
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for AML compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides AML teams a connected compliance layer connecting alerts, screenings, cases and reporting workflows for structured, auditable decision-making across digital asset AML operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage case escalation rules?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal policies to route, prioritize and escalate alerts and cases consistently while preserving human review and decision logs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decisions, supporting evidence and rule change logs to support a clear and defensible audit trail for compliance reviews and inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, connecting their outputs into centralized workflows without disrupting current compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing AML providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing AML providers by aggregating and structuring their outputs into cohesive workflows rather than replacing underlying tools.
final_title: Structure AML case escalation with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects alerts, screening outputs and workflows into consistent, audit-ready AML case escalation processes.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
